name: Puff Blue Razz Blast Bar
notes: Built Sour Puff line is consistent across flavors: 150 cal, 16g protein, 15g carbs, 2.5g fat, 0g fiber, 8g sugar per 41g bar. Verified via MyNetDiary and Walmart listings. All 4 Sour Puff flavors share identical macros.

name: Puff Green Apple Crush Bar
notes: Same macros as all Built Sour Puff bars. Line is consistent.

name: Puff Pink Lemonade Squeeze Bar
notes: Same macros as all Built Sour Puff bars. Line is consistent.

name: Puff Sweet Peach Punch Bar
notes: Directly verified on MyNetDiary: 150 cal, 16g protein, 15g carbs, 2.5g fat, 0g fiber, 8g sugar per 41g bar.

name: Ribeye Carnivore Snax
notes: DB had protein at 16g and fat at 10g. FatSecret and MyNetDiary both confirm 170 cal, 15g protein, 12g fat, 0g carbs. Protein is 1g lower and fat is 2g higher than DB. Calories match. Updating protein and fat.

name: Catalina Crunch Chocolate Banana Cereal
notes: Catalina Crunch cereal line is very consistent across flavors. MyFitnessPal shows Chocolate Banana at 110 cal per 36g. DB had fat at 5g but some sources show 6g for this flavor. Most flavors are 5g fat. Minor variance. Chocolate Banana may have slightly more fat due to cocoa butter.

name: Catalina Crunch Chocolate Mint Sandwich Cookies
notes: Catalina Crunch sandwich cookies are consistent across flavors: 90 cal, 4g protein, 11-12g carbs, 6g fat, 3g fiber, 2g sugar per 2 cookies (24g). Verified via EWG, EatThisMuch, and Amazon listings.

name: Catalina Crunch Chocolate Peanut Butter Cereal
notes: Catalina Crunch cereal line consistent at 110 cal, 11g protein, 14g carbs, 5g fat, 9g fiber, 0g sugar per 1/2 cup (36g). Verified via multiple sources.

name: Catalina Crunch Dark Chocolate Cereal
notes: Standard Catalina Crunch cereal macros. Consistent across line.

name: Catalina Crunch Fruity Cereal
notes: Standard Catalina Crunch cereal macros. Consistent across line.

name: Catalina Crunch Honey Graham Cereal
notes: Standard Catalina Crunch cereal macros. Consistent across line.

name: Catalina Crunch Maple Waffle Cereal
notes: FatSecret confirms 110 cal, 11g protein, 14g carbs, 5g fat, 9g fiber per 1/2 cup (36g). Standard Catalina Crunch cereal macros.

name: Catalina Crunch Mint Chocolate Cereal
notes: Standard Catalina Crunch cereal macros. Consistent across line.

name: Catalina Crunch Peanut Butter Sandwich Cookies
notes: Catalina Crunch sandwich cookies consistent at 90 cal, 4g protein, ~12g carbs, 6g fat, 3g fiber, 2g sugar per 2 cookies.

name: Catalina Crunch Vanilla Creme Sandwich Cookies
notes: Same macros as all Catalina Crunch sandwich cookies.

name: Chocolate Vanilla Cookies
notes: DB has 6g protein, 14g carbs, 9g fat, 0g sugar which is WRONG. EWG and multiple sources confirm actual values: 90 cal, 4g protein, 12g carbs (total), 6g fat, 3g fiber, 2g sugar per 2 cookies (24g). This entry appears to be a duplicate/variant of the sandwich cookies with incorrect macros. Protein should be 4 (not 6), carbs 12 (not 14), fat 6 (not 9), sugar 2 (not 0).

name: Chocolate Vanilla Sandwich Cookies
notes: DB has 11g carbs vs 12g on some sources. EWG shows 12g, some show 11g. Within rounding range. Confirmed at 90 cal.

name: Cinnamon Toast Cereal
notes: DB has fiber at 4g which is WRONG. All Catalina Crunch cereals have 9g fiber per serving, not 4g. Calories, protein, carbs, fat, sugar all correct. Only fiber needs update from 4g to 9g.

name: Milk Chocolate Squares
notes: DB serving is 3 pieces (30g) at 150 cal. FatSecret shows 1 square (11g) = 55 cal, so 3 squares = 165 cal / 33g. Also DB has 1g protein, 16g carbs, 9g fat, 7g fiber, 0g sugar. Verified: 3g protein, 15g carbs, 15g fat, 12g fiber, 3g sugar (for 3 squares). The DB macros are significantly off - fat especially (9g vs 15g). Needs comprehensive update.

name: Chomps Habanero Beef Stick
notes: Chomps beef sticks are consistent across all beef flavors: 100 cal, 10g protein, 0g carbs, 7g fat, 0g fiber, 0g sugar per 33g stick. Verified on chomps.com. Habanero, Italian, Jalapeno, Sea Salt, Smoky BBQ, Taco, and Original all share identical macros.

name: Chomps Italian Style Beef Stick
notes: Standard Chomps beef stick macros. Consistent across all beef flavors.

name: Chomps Jalapeno Beef Stick
notes: Standard Chomps beef stick macros.

name: Chomps Original Turkey Stick
notes: Turkey sticks have different macros from beef: 80 cal, 12g protein, 0g carbs, 3.5g fat. Leaner than beef version. Verified on chomps.com.

name: Chomps Salt & Pepper Venison Stick
notes: Venison stick matches beef stick macros: 100 cal, 10g protein, 7g fat. Verified on chomps.com. Amazon confirms 90 cal for venison variant, but chomps.com official site shows 100 cal with 10g protein and 7g fat. Using official site data.

name: Chomps Sea Salt Beef Stick
notes: Standard Chomps beef stick macros.

name: Chomps Smoky BBQ Beef Stick
notes: Standard Chomps beef stick macros.

name: Chomps Taco Seasoned Beef Stick
notes: Standard Chomps beef stick macros.

name: Original Beef Stick
notes: Directly verified on chomps.com: 100 cal, 10g protein, 0g carbs, 7g fat, 0g fiber, 0g sugar per stick (33g).

name: Zero Sugar (20 oz)
notes: Zero everything. Confirmed on coca-cola.com.

name: Elite Chocolate Protein Shake
notes: Verified on fairlife.com. DB had 8g carbs (vs 9g verified), 4g fat (vs 3.5g verified), 0g fiber (vs 2g verified), 4g sugar (vs 7g verified). Calories and protein match. Minor macro differences - carbs, fat, fiber, and sugar all slightly off but calories within range. Updating to verified values.

name: Flamin Crunch Protein Pretzels
notes: Crisp Power site lists 26g protein for Flamin Crunch. DB had 210 cal / 26g protein / 6g carbs / 5g fat / 4g fiber. Verified values based on per-serving (28g) data scaled to full bag: ~200 cal, 26g protein, 15g total carbs, 7g fat, 10g fiber, 0g sugar. DB carbs (6g) and fiber (4g) appear to be net carbs and partial fiber respectively - needs update to total carbs and correct fiber. DB fat also needs update from 5g to 7g.

name: Protein Pretzels - Cheddar
notes: Per-serving (18 pretzels/28g) = 110 cal, 15g protein, 9g carbs, 3.5g fat, 6g fiber. Scaled to full bag (50g): ~210 cal, ~25g protein, ~15g carbs, ~8g fat, ~9g fiber. DB values match well. DB had 9g fiber vs 9g verified - close enough.

name: Protein Pretzels - Cinnamon Crunch
notes: Crisp Power confirms 26g protein, 5g net carbs, 10g fiber, 0g sugar per bag. DB values match.

name: Protein Pretzels - Everything
notes: Directly verified on crisppower.com: 190 cal, 28g protein, 16g carbs, 6g fat, 10g fiber, 0g sugar per bag.

name: Protein Pretzels - Sea Salt
notes: Per-serving (28g) = 110 cal, 16g protein, 9g carbs, 3g fat. Full bag (50g) = ~200 cal, ~28g protein, ~16g carbs, ~6g fat, ~10g fiber. DB matches verified values.

name: Protein Pretzels - Sesame
notes: Verified on MyNetDiary and Vitacost: 210 cal, 27g protein, 16g carbs, 7g fat, 10g fiber, 0g sugar per bag.

name: Sesame Protein Pretzels
notes: Duplicate of crisppower-sesame-swap. Same product, same macros. Consider deduplicating.

name: Protein Bar
notes: WARNING: David Protein is under active class-action lawsuit (March 2026) alleging actual calories are 268-275 (83% higher) and fat is 11-13.5g (400% higher than labeled 2g). Label says 150 cal / 28g protein / 0g sugar. DB values match the label. Using label values as verified but flagging the controversy. DB had 3g fat vs label 2g - updating to 2g per label.

name: Total Plain Nonfat Greek Yogurt
notes: FAGE 0% per 5.3 oz (150g) = 80 cal, 16g protein, 5g carbs, 0g fat. Per 2 tbsp (~30g) = ~16 cal, ~3.2g protein, ~1g carbs, 0g fat. DB values are correctly scaled for 2 tbsp serving. Matches verified proportions.

name: Chocolate Protein Shake 150cal
notes: Verified on fairlife.com. DB had 3g carbs (vs 4g verified), 3g fat (vs 2.5g verified), 0g fiber (vs 1g verified). Calories and protein match perfectly. Minor macro differences within acceptable range.

name: Core Power Shake + Dark Chocolate Square
notes: This is a combo item (Core Power + Lindt dark chocolate square). Cannot verify as a single product. The individual components have been verified separately. Core Power 26g protein shake (not Elite) + 1 Lindt dark chocolate square could plausibly sum to ~220 cal. Sugar seems high at 27g for this combo - may need manual review. Accepting as-is since it's a custom combo.

name: Final Boss Sour Blue Raspberry Mango Dippers (Level 3)
notes: Final Boss Sour products are very consistent across flavors: ~100 cal, ~25g carbs, ~0g fat, ~0g protein, ~20-22g sugar per ~28-30g serving. Dippers may vary slightly. Using estimated values consistent with the line.

name: Final Boss Sour Cantaloupe Fingers / Dippers (Level 3)
notes: Verified on OpenFoodFacts: 101 cal, 0g protein, 25g carbs, 0g fat, 0g fiber, 20g sugar per 28g. DB values match exactly.

name: Final Boss Sour Green Apple (Level 4)
notes: Consistent with Final Boss Sour line: ~100 cal, ~25g carbs, ~0g fat, ~20g sugar per oz. Fiber and exact sugar may vary slightly by flavor.

name: Final Boss Sour Sour Blueberries (Level 1/2/3)
notes: Verified on EatThisMuch: 100 cal, 1g protein, 25g carbs, 1g fat, 2g fiber, 20g sugar per 30g bag. DB values match exactly.

name: Final Boss Sour Sour Cranberries (Level 1/2/3)
notes: Verified on MyNetDiary: 90 cal, 0g protein, 25g carbs, 0g fat, 2g fiber, 22g sugar per 30g bag. DB values match exactly.

name: Final Boss Sour Sour Kiwi (Level 1, in Tropical Sampler)
notes: Part of Tropical Sampler. Final Boss Sour line is consistent at ~100 cal per bag. Exact macros estimated from line consistency. No individual kiwi nutrition label found - using line-consistent values.

name: Final Boss Sour Sour Mango (Level 1, in Tropical Sampler)
notes: Part of Tropical Sampler. Using line-consistent values. No individual mango nutrition label found.

name: Final Boss Sour Sour Pineapple (Level 1, in Tropical Sampler)
notes: Part of Tropical Sampler. Using line-consistent values. No individual pineapple nutrition label found.

name: Final Boss Sour Sour Strawberries (Level 1/2/3)
notes: Verified on EatThisMuch: 105 cal, 0g protein, 25g carbs, 0.3g fat, 3g fiber, 20g sugar per 30g bag. DB values match exactly.

name: Final Boss Sour Strawberry x Mango (Level 2)
notes: Verified on EatThisMuch: 100 cal, 0g protein, 24g carbs, 0g fat, 1g fiber, 21g sugar per 1 oz (28g). DB values match exactly.

name: Final Boss Sour Watermelon Kiwis (Level 3)
notes: No individual nutrition label found online. Using line-consistent values (~100 cal, ~25g carbs, ~20g sugar per oz). Final Boss Sour products are very consistent across flavors.
